creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=63974c070ff072210b7991216bd8779e4302e4e3

commit 63974c070ff072210b7991216bd8779e4302e4e3
Author:     Michael Reifenberger <mr@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2024-11-19 16:25:01 +0000
Commit:     Michael Reifenberger <mr@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-11-19 16:25:01 +0000

    security/vaultwarden: Security update to 1.32.5

    This release further fixed some CVE Reports reported
    by a third party security auditor and we recommend everybody to update
    to the latest version as soon as possible.
    The contents of these reports will be disclosed publicly in the future.

    PR:             282795
    Reported by:    Bernard Spil

 security/vaultwarden/Makefile.crates |  4 ++++

 4 files changed, 16 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)
